name: Peter's Favorite Strawberries
recipeIngredient: Sugar substitute equivalent to 1 tablespoon sugar (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the strawberries thoroughly and remove any hulls.
2. Cut the orange in half lengthwise, then into wedges with the peel left on as thinly as possible.
3. Place strawberries and orange wedges in a bowl and mix well.
4. Mix together the orange juice and sweet vermouth in a separate small bowl.
5. Drizzle the mixture over the fruit and gently stir to combine.
6. Taste the fruit mixture and add the sugar substitute if needed for sweetness, following the instructions on the packaging.
7. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours before serving to allow flavors to meld together.
8. Stir gently several times during chilling to ensure even distribution of flavors.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 FRUIT EXCHANGE
CAL: 56
CHO: 11g
PRO: 1g
FAT: 0g
SOD: 1mg
CHO: 0mg
LOW-SODIUM DIETS: This recipe is excellent.
